content.query:
-- creating file format object
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT ParquetFileFormat
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET
);

IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM sys.tables t JOIN sys.schemas s on t.schema_id = s.schema_id
WHERE t.name='ext_silvertable' and s.name='silver')
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE silver.ext_silvertable
(
    OrderID         VARCHAR(50),
    OrderDate       DATETIME,
    CustomerID      VARCHAR(50),
    CustomerName    VARCHAR(100),
    CustomerEmail   VARCHAR(100),
    ProductID       VARCHAR(50),
    ProductName     VARCHAR(100),
    ProductCategory VARCHAR(100),
    RegionID        VARCHAR(50),
    RegionName      VARCHAR(100),
    Country         VARCHAR(100),
    Quantity        VARCHAR(50),
    UnitPrice       VARCHAR(20),
    TotalAmount     VARCHAR(20),
    Domain          VARCHAR(100)
)
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'enrichedSales/',
    DATA_SOURCE = silver_extsource,
    FILE_FORMAT = ParquetFileFormat  -- referncing the file format object by its name
)
